# On Side Speed

**Menu:** `Events/Object/Movement`

**Nome serializado:** `OnSideSpeed`

**Classe fonte:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Events/ObjectMovement/OnSideSpeedNode.java`

## Funcao

Evento que dispara quando a condicao `On Side Speed` acontece.
